name: Jamtha
metaTitle: Property in Jamtha Nagpur | NMRDA Approved Plots | Mahalaxmi Infra
metaDescription: Buy NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved plots in Jamtha Nagpur. Starting ₹22 Lakh. Up to 90% bank finance. Contact Mahalaxmi Infra today.
heroSubheading: At the Heart of Nagpur's Fastest Growth Zone
introduction: Jamtha is one of the most strategically located residential areas in Nagpur, sitting directly on Wardha Road in close proximity to MIHAN. The village of Mouza Jamtha has seen transformational real estate growth over the past five years as the MIHAN project has accelerated. With AIIMS Nagpur, IIM Nagpur, and the international cargo airport all within close reach, Jamtha has become one of the most sought-after destinations for residential plot investment in the city. Mahalaxmi Infra's flagship project — Mahalaxmi Nagar 42 — is located in Mouza Jamtha, offering NMRDA sanctioned, RERA approved plots with up to 90% bank financing. Early buyers in Jamtha have seen significant appreciation, and the outlook for the next 5–10 years remains strongly positive.
whyInvest: Directly on Wardha Road near MIHAN
AIIMS and IIM Nagpur within close reach
